---
id: get-all-places
title: "Get all property places/locations"
description: "Retrieve all active destination areas (places) where properties are listed. Returns place names, slugs, coordinates, cover photos, and descriptions. Use this to build a location picker, homepage destination grid, or map-based navigation."
sidebar_label: "Get all property places/locations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all property places/locations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/places"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve all active destination areas (places) where properties are listed. Returns place names, slugs, coordinates, cover photos, and descriptions. Use this to build a location picker, homepage destination grid, or map-based navigation.

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-all-places.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
